reviews.review_description: I love this app, it's perfect for jumping in for 5-20 min. The layout is simple and you are quickly transported to amazing places in Icelandic nature. The only thing it really needs is more fantastic locations and music.

Beautiful locations and great quality videos. Just an option to remove the talking would be great so that I can just listen to the natural sounds of the environment. As it stands i have to mute the volume to block out the voice over.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for your feedback! We love hearing from our customers. We will let you know when these choices become available - hopefully soon!

reviews.review_description: I love the pure Icelandic landscapes, so untouched and raw. The settings provide a perfect place to drop deeper within and begin to meditate. Sometimes I naturally close my eyes but when I open them again I am comforted by being immersed in nature. I am surprised at the power of these six modes of FLOWVR meditation!
Video quality is superb, but we need to be able to at least turn off the voice.
The experience of FLOWVR is calming and mesmerizing. I normally have a hard time quieting my thoughts down when I meditate and it usually take a long time to

This is a great application for temporary escapes from the daily business tempo. Wonderful places and great natural soundscapes. The addition of a smooth voiceover and music soundtrack is nice, BUT it would be a nealy perfect experience if I could switch of the voiceover and music by option before I start a meditation. ... so at the moment only four stars.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your great review. You are the third person out of three reviews to request the option of switching off the sound, or music or guided meditation before starting. We will certainly give this some serious thought as we work on our next versions! We always intended to give our audience these options, so this will surely evolve with more choices. Thanks for taking the time to let us know your thoughts and for your appreciation of FLOWVR.

reviews.review_title: Not good enough for a paid product
reviews.review_description: I do enjoy the cinematic, but I get distracted by the loops. The sound level is not that balanced and the meditation options available are quite limited. For my daily meditations I prefer another product which is free, so I'm a little disappointed with this one
I hope the voice can be muted. And the videos resolution can be higher (like another similar app). 4 star for now.
This App brought me home by helping me remember what truly matters. Soft, calming, empowering and above all true.
